title: LCID / Lucid Group, Inc. Price Forecast and Trading Analysis
text: TradingView's technical analysis and price forecasts for Lucid show the stock trading at depressed levels relative to 2021 IPO highs. Chart patterns indicate support levels around $2-3 per share and resistance at $6-7 per share. Volume analysis shows significant institutional selling pressure in recent months. Short interest remains elevated, reflecting bear market consensus. The technical picture suggests potential for brief rallies but lacks conviction for sustained upside until operational fundamentals improve. Price momentum indicators remain negative, consistent with the fundamental deterioration in profitability and guidance. Trading analysis notes that the stock exhibits high volatility, providing opportunities for swing traders but significant risks for longer-term investors.
